title: ottonia lessertiana
intro: Ottonia lessertiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae, commonly known as a type of lilyturf or lilyturf grass. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Ottonia lessertiana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, among others. Herbal preparations of Ottonia lessertiana include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also sometimes used as a food ingredient in Southeast Asian cuisine.
